title: Nano-island-encapsulated cobalt single-atom catalysts for breaking activity-stability trade-off in Fenton-like reactions

跨学科关系.head: 纳米岛封装
跨学科关系.relation: 通过纳米岛结构限制并稳定
跨学科关系.evidence: small carrier-based ZnO nanoparticles (the 'islands') are utilized to confine and stabilize Co single atoms

跨学科关系.head: 活性-稳定性权衡
跨学科关系.relation: 制约其性能表现
跨学科关系.evidence: SACs face a trade-off between activity and stability in PMS-based systems

跨学科关系.head: PMS激活
跨学科关系.relation: 通过活化产生
跨学科关系.evidence: exclusively generating sulfate radicals (SO₄•⁻) via PMS activation

跨学科关系.head: 酸性条件
跨学科关系.relation: 加剧金属中心浸出
跨学科关系.evidence: Under such acidic conditions, active metal centers are prone to leaching

跨学科关系.head: ZnO纳米颗粒
跨学科关系.relation: 作为纳米岛载体实现封装
跨学科关系.evidence: small carrier-based ZnO nanoparticles (the 'islands') are utilized to confine Co atoms

跨学科关系.head: 不饱和配位环境
跨学科关系.relation: 赋予高反应性的结构特征
跨学科关系.evidence: The high reactivity of SACs stems from their unsaturated coordination environments

跨学科关系.head: 复杂水矩阵
跨学科关系.relation: 影响降解效率的环境因素
跨学科关系.evidence: efficient in multiple treatment cycles and complex water matrices

跨学科关系.head: 析氢反应
跨学科关系.relation: 通过纳米岛设计增强催化活性
跨学科关系.evidence: CeO₂₋ₓ nano-islands boosting hydrogen evolution reactions

化学.rationale: 提供催化反应机理与活性评估框架

材料科学.rationale: 构建催化剂空间限域结构与电子调控方案

环境科学技术.rationale: 定义污染物处理效能的环境适用性边界

title: High-entropy alloy enables multi-path electron synergism and lattice oxygen activation for enhanced oxygen evolution activity

跨学科关系.head: high-entropy alloys (HEAs)
跨学科关系.relation: 通过多路径电子协同作用激活
跨学科关系.evidence: high-entropy alloys (HEAs) can efficiently activate the LOM through synergistic multi-path electron transfer

跨学科关系.head: multi-path electron transfer
跨学科关系.relation: 增强金属离子的高氧化态
跨学科关系.evidence: the oxidation of nickel is enhanced by this electron transfer

跨学科关系.head: NiFeCoCrW₀.₂ HEA
跨学科关系.relation: 在10 mA cm⁻²电流密度下实现220 mV过电位
跨学科关系.evidence: design of a NiFeCoCrW₀.₂ HEA that exhibits improved activity, achieving an overpotential of 220 mV at a current density of 10 mA cm⁻²

跨学科关系.head: Raman spectroscopy
跨学科关系.relation: 检测到506 cm⁻¹处的Ni–O键A1g伸缩振动模式
跨学科关系.evidence: peak observed at 506 cm⁻¹ in the Raman spectrum is indicative of the A1g stretching mode of the Ni–O bond

跨学科关系.head: TMA⁺ cations
跨学科关系.relation: 与含氧中间体存在强相互作用
跨学科关系.evidence: robust interaction between TMA⁺ ions and the negatively charged oxygen-containing intermediates (O₂⁻)

跨学科关系.head: multi-path electronic modulation
跨学科关系.relation: 调控电催化OER机制转变
跨学科关系.evidence: multi-path electronic modulation in manipulating electrocatalytic mechanistic shifts

跨学科关系.head: high-entropy structure
跨学科关系.relation: 促进高效电催化LOM路径启动
跨学科关系.evidence: high-entropy structure promotes the initiation of an efficient electrocatalytic LOM pathway

化学.rationale: 提供电解质环境与中间体相互作用分析，支撑电催化反应机理验证

材料科学.rationale: 通过高熵合金设计与晶格调控实现催化剂结构优化和电子传递增强

title: MXene-Assisted NiFe sulfides for high-performance anion exchange membrane seawater electrolysis

跨学科关系.head: MXene (Ti₃C₂)
跨学科关系.relation: integrating MXene with NiFe sulfides forms a composite electrocatalyst
跨学科关系.evidence: integrating MXene (Ti₃C₂) with NiFe sulfides ((Ni,Fe)S₂@Ti₃C₂)

跨学科关系.head: (Ni,Fe)S₂@Ti₃C₂
跨学科关系.relation: triggers lattice oxygen mechanism through electron distribution
跨学科关系.evidence: strong interaction induces electron distribution to trigger lattice oxygen mechanism

跨学科关系.head: Ti-O-Fe bonding
跨学科关系.relation: prohibits dissolution of Fe species during OER process
跨学科关系.evidence: Ti-O-Fe bonding effectively prohibits the dissolution of Fe species

跨学科关系.head: Cl⁻ resistance
跨学科关系.relation: good retention of sulfates provides effective Cl⁻ resistance
跨学科关系.evidence: good retention of sulfates and abundant groups of Ti₃C₂ provide effective Cl⁻ resistance

跨学科关系.head: electrochemical impedance spectroscopy
跨学科关系.relation: analyzes ohmic overvoltage through electrochemical impedance spectroscopy
跨学科关系.evidence: ohmic overvoltage analyzed via electrochemical impedance spectroscopy

跨学科关系.head: anion exchange membrane seawater electrolysis
跨学科关系.relation: specific application of anion exchange membrane in seawater systems
跨学科关系.evidence: AEMSE with industrial current density (0.5 A cm⁻²)

跨学科关系.head: electron transfer
跨学科关系.relation: projected density of states shows charge separation through electron transfer
跨学科关系.evidence: projected density of states and band diagrams show charge separation

跨学科关系.head: Raney Ni cathode
跨学科关系.relation: achieves industrial current density with electrolysis efficiency of 70%
跨学科关系.evidence: Raney Ni cathode with electrolysis efficiency of 70% and energy consumption of 48.4 kWh kg⁻¹ H₂

化学.rationale: 提供反应机制解析与稳定性调控策略，支撑电催化剂性能优化

材料科学.rationale: 主导功能材料设计与表征技术开发，实现催化剂结构调控与性能验证
